{{Quote|Which will it be Jedi? Do you save the city or Ackbar's sorry hide?|A terrorist|<ref name="poly108">{{PolyhedronCite|108|What's so Bad About the Dark Side? The Ethical Dilemma of Force-Users}}</ref>}}
'''Fahjay''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual who once saved [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] life from two terrorists. He kicked the door open into the room in which Ackbar was being held captive and immediately saw one terrorist with a [[Knife/Legends|knife]] at Ackbar's throat and the other reaching for a switch which would blow the [[City/Legends|city's]] power grid. With a quick decision, Fahjay lowered his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], closed his [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetically]] tugged the knife out of one terrorist's hand, and embedded it in the chest of the other. This was the first instance in which Fahjay had committed an act of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and a part of him reveled in the act, and so he recited to himself the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. Though calmness settled over him, the stain of this [[Death/Legends|death]] haunted him for a long time.
